_comment: Markdown link injection patterns for runtime/markdown-link-scan.js. Mirrors the baked-in BUILTIN_PATTERNS in the module. Edit here to tune without touching JS.

patterns.note: javascript: href — executes JS on click in browser/preview contexts (RFC 3986 §3.1; OWASP DOM-based XSS)
data: URI — can render inline HTML with scripts (RFC 2397; OWASP data URI injection)
user:pass@host in URL — credential smuggling; browser hides userinfo segment (RFC 3986 §3.2.1)
Token/secret in query string — leaks to logs, search indexes, CI (OWASP Sensitive Data Exposure)
